text: The department may enter into a contract to carry out this chapter, including a contract with an agency of another state or with another organization.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.006 — Contracting Authority

The department may enter into a contract to carry out this chapter, including a contract with an agency of another state or with another organization.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
